use_cases: Showcasing product features on a SaaS landing page
Displaying service offerings in a responsive grid layout
Highlighting benefits and capabilities in a product showcase section
Presenting pricing plan features with visual icons
Creating an about or capabilities section for software products
ai_summary: A feature grid component that displays product capabilities in a responsive grid of cards with glass-morphism styling. Each card shows an icon, title, and description with smooth hover animations including scale and background transitions. Designed for SaaS and software product pages to showcase features or benefits in an elegant, modern presentation.
